message:
chore: pin frankensearch to local repo, update deps, ignore ML caches

Pin frankensearch dependency to file:///dp/frankensearch per local
source-of-truth policy instead of GitHub URL. Update corresponding
[patch] section. Update Cargo.lock to reflect dependency resolution
changes.

Add .fastembed_cache/ and .onnx_cache/ to .gitignore for ML model
weight cache directories that are generated at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -114,3 +114,7 @@ storage.sqlite3-*
 
 # Codegen sub-crate lock files (generated, not the workspace root Cargo.lock)
 **/codegen/Cargo.lock
+
+# ML model caches (fastembed, ONNX, etc.)
+.fastembed_cache/
+.onnx_cache/

@@ -2480,7 +2480,7 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "frankensearch"
 version = "0.1.0"
-source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch?rev=3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da#3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da"
+source = "git+file:///dp/frankensearch?rev=3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da#3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da"

  "asupersync",
  "frankensearch-core",
